{{Infobox technique
| name = Binding magic
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Binding magic]] can knit wounds together and lock enemies in place.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Binding magic]] is one of the fields a wizard can specialize in.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator can switch to [[binding]] magic.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator uses [[binding]] magic to maintain their position.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
